## What this changes

## Type

- [ ] New corpus (+ committed frozen snapshot)
- [ ] New strategy
- [ ] Pricing refresh
- [ ] Bug fix / docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes (offline, no API key)
- [ ] Any numbers in `results/` or README come from a **real** `agent-memory-bench run` — none fabricated
- [ ] If a strategy models a real tool rather than invoking it, the module docstring says so
- [ ] New corpus snapshots are committed under `agent_memory_bench/data/`
